hooks.command: bash -c 'cd /home/dan/Desktop/github/auto_networking && files=$(git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep "\.py$" | head -20 | tr "\n" " "); if [ -n "$files" ]; then .venv/bin/ruff check --fix $files 2>&1 | head -40; .venv/bin/black $files 2>&1 | head -20; .venv/bin/mypy $files 2>&1 | head -40; fi'

bash -c 'cd /home/dan/Desktop/github/auto_networking && files=$(git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\.(yml|yaml|json)$" | grep -v ".github" | grep -v "settings.json" | head -10 | tr "\n" " "); if [ -n "$files" ]; then echo "Intent/schema files changed: $files — run ibn-agent to validate"; fi'
